subject: you
original_context_text: I heard—I don't know whether awake or asleep—our father's cry: "We're hitting something!," a meaningless expression (since before then nothing had ever hit anything, [[you]] can be sure), but one that took on meaning at the very moment it was uttered, that is, it meant the sensation we were beginning to experience, slightly nauseating, like a slab of mud passing under us, something flat, on which we felt we were bouncing.
